$comment: scripts/RocketHideoutB4F.asm — Giovanni guards the SILPH SCOPE (OPP_GIOVANNI party 1). Beat him: the WHAT! line, the flag, his concession, then HideObject Giovanni + ShowObject ITEM_4 (the SILPH SCOPE ball at (25,2)); the _shown records persist both across loads.

commands.text:
So! I must say, I
am impressed you
got here!

then.text:
I see that you
raise POKéMON
with utmost care. A child like you
would never
understand what I
hope to achieve. I shall step
aside this time! I hope we meet
again...
